title: ANC - 1. Main in-call scenario > Automatic toggle to ANC feature
scenario: Verify that during an active call, ANC automatically turns ON with the previously selected mode, Transparency is greyed out with a popup, and after the call ends, ANC turns OFF and Transparency becomes accessible again.
steps: Observe the ANC status — it should automatically turn ON with the previously selected mode (Adaptive or Standard).
Check the Transparency mode toggle — it should be greyed out and inaccessible.
Tap the Transparency toggle during the call.
Observe the popup informing the user that Transparency mode is unavailable during a call.
Observe that ANC turns OFF automatically.
Check that Transparency mode becomes accessible again with the previously selected option.
Toggle between ANC and Transparency modes to confirm normal operation.
expected: During an active call, ANC turns ON automatically with the previously selected mode, Transparency is greyed out and inaccessible, and tapping it shows a popup that it's unavailable. After the call ends, ANC turns OFF, Transparency becomes accessible with the previous selection, and the user can toggle normally between ANC and Transparency.
